S-20001:
KAM: Good morning Arjun ji, main IndiaMART se bol raha hoon. Aapka renewal next month hai, main check karna chahta tha ki sab theek chal raha hai.
Seller: Dekho bhai, mujhe seedha baat karni hai. Pichhle teen mahino mein meri login 38 se 23 percent pe aa gayi hai. Koi fayda nahi dikh raha mujhe. Paise barbaad ho rahe hain.
KAM: Sir, main samajh sakta hoon. Kya aap bata sakte hain ki leads quality kaisi rahi?
Seller: Leads? Sab retail buyers bhej rahe ho. Main B2B construction material supplier hoon. Retail wale mujhe kya karenge? Mera time barbaad hota hai unhein reply karne mein.
KAM: Sir, yeh BL filter issue hai. Main aaj hi aapka case product team ko escalate karta hoon. Hum aapka lead filter fix karwa denge is week mein.
Seller: Pichli baar bhi yahi bola tha kisi ne. Kuch nahi hua. Main soch raha hoon TradeIndia try karta hoon.
KAM: Sir, main personally follow up karunga. Aap mujhe ek chance dijiye, main Friday tak update dunga.

KAM: Arjun ji, follow up ke liye call kar raha hoon. Humne aapka BL filter issue product team ko submit kar diya hai. ETA 2 weeks hai.
Seller: Haan, dekha maine email. Lekin 2 weeks bahut zyada hai. Mera renewal toh agle mahine hai.
KAM: Sir, main guarantee de sakta hoon ki filter fix hone ke baad aapko quality B2B leads milenge. Aapne pehle achi leads li hain humse.
Seller: Haan, pehle theek tha. Ab kya guarantee hai ki baar baar yahi problem nahi aayegi?
KAM: Sir, main aapko is case ka ticket number dunga aur directly product team se confirmation dilwaata hoon.
S-20002:
KAM: Deepa ji, namaste. Aapka MDC package renew hone wala hai. Kuch baat karni thi.
Seller: Haan bolo. Ek baat seedha poochhna chahti hoon - meri BL consumption 34 se 12 percent aa gayi. Koi value nahi mil raha.
KAM: Deepa ji, yeh drop kaafi significant hai. Kya aap bata sakti hain ki leads pe response de rahi hain?
Seller: De rahi hoon na. Lekin buyers serious nahi hote. Yahan Bizongo wale bol rahe hain ki dedicated buyer manager milega. Kuch value toh dikh rahi hai unki pitch mein.
KAM: Bizongo ke baare mein samajh sakta hoon. Lekin IndiaMART pe aapka established presence hai - 3 saal se listings hain. Naye platform pe sab zero se shuru karna padega.
Seller: Yeh sach hai. Lekin kuch toh karo tum log. Mere catalog mein help chahiye, buyers properly filter nahi ho rahe.
KAM: Deepa ji, main aapko ek dedicated catalog expert assign karwata hoon is hafte. Aur personally aapka account review karunga next week.
S-20003:
KAM: Rajesh ji, good afternoon. Renewal discussion ke liye call kiya tha.
Seller: Haan theek hai. Mujhe koi problem nahi hai actually - business chal raha hai. Bas last month se PNS pickup rate gir gayi meri.
KAM: Rajesh ji, PNS pickup rate 55 se 25 pe aa gayi hai - yeh kaafi zyada drop hai. Koi specific reason?
Seller: Arre actually woh busy tha main. Kuch orders aa gaye the offline se. Indiammart se bhi achhe leads aa rahe hain, main regularly check nahi kar paa raha tha.
KAM: Toh basically aap busy the positive wajah se. Koi platform issue nahi thi.
Seller: Nahi nahi, platform theek hai. Bas mujhe reminder feature chahiye ki koi lead pending hai toh notify kare. Yeh feature hai?
KAM: Haan sir, PNS notification settings main aapko configure karwa deta hoon abhi call pe hi.
S-20004:
KAM: Sunita ji, namaste. Aapka account review karne ke liye call kiya tha.
Seller: Acha timing se call kiya. Main khud aapko call karne wali thi. BL filter bilkul kaam nahi kar raha - 60 percent retail buyers aa rahe hain mere paas. Main industrial machinery supplier hoon.
KAM: Yeh serious issue hai Sunita ji. Maine dekha hai ki aapki category mein multiple sellers ko yahi problem aa rahi hai.
Seller: Haan? Matlab sirf mera problem nahi hai?
KAM: Nahi, yeh systemic issue lag raha hai aapki category mein. Main aaj ek consolidated report product team ko bhejta hoon. Aapka zyada weight hoga complaint mein.
Seller: Acha yeh toh acha hai. Toh kab fix hoga?
KAM: 2 hafte mein I am hoping. Aur main guarantee karta hoon ki jab tak fix nahi hota, main personally aapke useful leads filter karke forward karunga.
Seller: Theek hai. Yeh commitment sunke thodi relief hui.
S-20005:
KAM: Vikram ji, good morning. Renewal ke baare mein baat karni thi.
Seller: Haan bolo. Mujhe actually batao ki ab kya naya feature aaya hai IndiaMART pe. Main already decide kar chuka hoon renew karna.
KAM: Vikram ji, bahut acchi baat hai. Aapka account quite healthy dikh raha hai. Login 82 percent, BL consumption 71 percent.
Seller: Haan kaam ho raha hai. Lekin ek cheez poochh raha tha - mera Star package mein upgrade ho sakta hai? Annual business badh raha hai mera.
KAM: Bilkul Vikram ji. Main aapko Star package benefits compare karke ek proposal bhejta hoon aaj shaam tak.
Seller: Theek hai, bhejo. Aur catalog mein seasonal products add karne mein help chahiye, rainy season ka stock aaya hai.
S-20006:
KAM: Priya ji, main IndiaMART KAM Rohan bol raha hoon. Aapka package renewal 45 din mein hai.
Seller: Haan Rohan ji. Suno, main bahut frustrated hoon. Meri LMS reply rate 45 se 18 pe aa gayi. System hi kaam nahi kar raha tha ek hafte.
KAM: Priya ji, yeh kaafi problem hai. Kab se yeh issue aa raha tha?
Seller: Last month ke 10 tarikh ke baad se. Maine tickets bhi raise kiye the. Koi response nahi aaya.
KAM: Priya ji, main abhi check karta hoon aapke ticket ka status. Yeh acceptable nahi hai. Main personally support team se escalate karta hoon aur aaj shaam tak resolution dunga.
Seller: Main ek baat aur bolunga - mera competitor JK Traders bhi IndiaMART pe hai. Woh bol raha tha usne upgrade liya aur leads double ho gayi. Kya yeh sach hai?
KAM: Priya ji, yeh case by case hota hai. Lekin aapka current issue pehle fix karte hain. Jab system properly kaam kare, tab upgrade discuss karte hain - tabhi fair comparison hoga.
Seller: Theek hai. Pehle yeh system issue fix karo.
